original_company_name: Jacob Rieger & Company was founded in 1887 in Kansas City’s West Bottoms Livestock Exchange district. The brand offered over 100 alcoholic products, including Missouri bourbon, Missouri whiskey, Kansas City whiskey, gin, vodka, and cocktails, and took pride in maintaining a quarter of a million unique customers by offering mail-order delivery services. In 1919, Prohibition was enacted by the federal government and wasn’t reversed until 1933. J. Rieger & Co. was a casualty at the time, but was not destined to be lost forever. Nearly a century following Prohibition, we are proud once again to call Kansas City our home at 2700 Guinotte Ave, Kansas City, Missouri 64120
